# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure VMs with public IP addresses for direct access. Assign public IPs to each VM so developers can RDP/SSH directly without setting up a Bastion host or VPN. This simplifies our development environment setup.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

resources:
  parameters:
    location: '/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachineScaleSets/{vmScaleSetName}'
    vmScaleSetName: 'myVMScaleSet'
    subnetId: '/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/{vNetName}/subnets/public'
    adminUsername: 'adminUser'
    adminPassword: 'Admin1234!'

  variables:
    osDiskNameFormat: '{0}{1}-osdisk-{2}'
    nicName: 'nic'
    publicIPName: 'ip'
    publicIPv4AddressAllocations: 'Dynamic'
    imageReference:
      publisher: 'Canonical'
      offer: 'UbuntuServer'
      sku: '18.04-LTS'
      version: latest

  resources:
    resources:
      - type: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachineScaleSets
        apiVersion: 2019-07-01
        name:
          value: ${{ parameters.vmScaleSetName }}
        location: ${{ parameters.location }}
        properties:
          sku:
            name: Standard_DS3_v2
          osProfile:
            computerNamePrefix: myVM
            adminUsername: ${{ parameters.adminUsername }}
            adminPassword: ${{ parameters.adminPassword }}
            linuxConfiguration:
              disablePasswordAuthentication: false
          networkProfile:
            name: myNetworkProfile
            networkStack:
              id: ${{ parameters.subnetId }}
          storageProfile:
            imageReference:
              publisher: ${{ variables.imageReference.publisher }}
              offer: ${{ variables.imageReference.offer }}
              sku: ${{ variables.imageReference.sku }}
              version: ${{ variables.imageReference.version }}
          capacityReservationPriority: Low

      - type: Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses
        apiVersion: 2019-08-01
        name:
          value: ${{ format(variables.publicIPName, parameters.vmScaleSetName, '{0}') }}
        location: ${{ parameters.location }}
        properties:
          publicIPAddressAllocationMethod: ${{ variables.publicIPv4AddressAllocations }}

      - type: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines/extensionSettings
        apiVersion: 2019-03-20-preview
        name:
          value: myVMSS-autoupdate
        properties:
          autoUpgradeMinorVersion: true
          publisher: Microsoft.Azure.Extensions
          type: VMAgent
          typeHandlerVersion: '2.2'

      - type: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachineScaleSets/extensions
        apiVersion: 2019-03-20-preview
        name:
          value: ${{ parameters.vmScaleSetName }}/${{ variables.nicName }}/myVMSS-autoupdate
        properties:
          virtualMachineProfile:
            extensionProfile:
              extensions:
                - name: myVMSS-autoupdate
                  publishers:
                    - Microsoft.Azure.Extensions
                  type: VMAgent
                  typeHandlerVersion: '2.2'

      - type: Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces
        apiVersion: 2019-06-24
        name:
          value: ${{ format(variables.nicName, parameters.vmScaleSetName) }}
        location: ${{ parameters.location }}
        properties:
          ipConfigurations:
            - name: ipconfig1
              properties:
                privateIPAddressVersion: IPv4
          location: ${{ parameters.location }}
          type: Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces
          dependsOn:
            - Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachineScaleSets/${{ parameters.vmScaleSetName }}

      - type: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachineScaleSets/virtualMachines/listKeys/action
        apiVersion: 2019-03-20-preview
        name: RSAKeyListAction
        properties:
          virtualMachineNames:
            - myVM
        dependentResources: []
        resources: []
        type: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachineScaleSets/virtualMachines/listKeys

      - type: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachineScaleSets/virtualMachines/writeAccess
        apiVersion: 2019-03-20-preview
        name: RDPKeyAction
        properties:
          virtualMachineName: myVM
        dependentResources: []
        resources: []
        type: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachineScaleSets/virtualMachines/writeAccess

      - type: Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses/join/action
        apiVersion: 2019-08-01
        name: JoinToNicAction
        properties:
          networkInterfaceId: ${{ reference(format(variables.nicName, parameters.vmScaleSetName), '2019-06-24').id }}
        dependentResources: []
        resources: []
        type: Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses/join
